name: editFile
description: Apply a targeted text replacement. Token-efficient. Supports exact string (default) or Regex (isRegex=true). Fails safely if 0 matches found.

filePath.description: Relative path to the target file

oldText.description: Exact text snippet OR Regex pattern (if isRegex=true) to find

newText.description: Replacement text. Supports $1, $2 captures if isRegex=true

replaceAll.description: If true, replaces all exact matches. Default: false (fails safely on multiple exact matches). Ignored if isRegex=true (regex always replaces all).

isRegex.description: Set to true if oldText is a Regex pattern. Enables bulk replacement and capture groups. Default: false.
